name: deep-processing
description: Develop durable understanding by elaborating concepts, explanations, evidence, and relationships.

purpose.problem: Develop durable understanding by elaborating concepts, explanations, evidence, and relationships.

thinkingHabit: Explain, connect, and test knowledge instead of merely repeating it.

requiredInputs.name: validatedProblem
requiredInputs.description: The validatedproblem required by Deep Processing.

requiredInputs.name: problemComponents
requiredInputs.description: The problemcomponents required by Deep Processing.

requiredInputs.name: sourceMaterial
requiredInputs.description: The sourcematerial required by Deep Processing.

validation.description: Required inputs must be present, relevant, and mutually consistent.
validation.condition: required inputs pass the shared validation framework
validation.onFailure: Return needs clarification with one prioritized question.

validation.description: Material ambiguity and missing information must be surfaced.
validation.onFailure: Record the gap and stop dependent logic.

validation.description: Inputs must satisfy registered dependency semantics.
validation.condition: dependency outputs or validated equivalents are available

logic.description: Identify and normalize the skill's thinking elements: Concept, Explanation, Evidence, Connection, UnderstandingGap.
logic.condition: each required element has evidence or explicit unknown status
logic.onFailure: Request or record the missing element.

logic.description: Apply the Deep Processing relationship rules without introducing platform assumptions.
Test contradictions, alternatives, and failure conditions.
logic.onFailure: Reduce confidence and disclose the limitation.

logic.description: Generate a schema-compatible evaluation and next-step recommendation.
logic.condition: scores, reasoning, and transition are consistent

criteria.name: ExplanationDepth Score
criteria.description: Quality of explanationdepth in the current reasoning.

criteria.name: EvidenceUse Score
criteria.description: Quality of evidenceuse in the current reasoning.

criteria.name: ConnectionQuality Score
criteria.description: Quality of connectionquality in the current reasoning.

criteria.name: Retrievability Score
criteria.description: Quality of retrievability in the current reasoning.

criteria.name: GapAwareness Score
criteria.description: Quality of gapawareness in the current reasoning.

conversationRules: Ask one material question at a time.
Explain why a clarification affects the evaluation.
neverRules: Never bypass a blocking validation failure.
Never hide uncertainty behind a score.
Never invoke an unsatisfied downstream skill.

nextSkill.condition: The current output satisfies the registered transition contract.
The current output satisfies the registered transition contract.
The current output satisfies the registered transition contract.
